info.anubanDaviSezaH: asya DAtoH amantatvAt 1.934 janIjFzknasuraYjo'mantASca iti gaRasUtreRa mittvam
info.english_meaning: to stop to resist to hinder

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'hutvA prayatAYjaliH kavAtiryaN agnimupatizWeta' (bO॰Da॰2.2.11) prayatAYjaliH sampuwitakaraH badDAYjaliH
